falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained break above this level would indicate bullish momentum contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and historical bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: CBOE VIX drops below 15 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extremely low volatility would invalidate the 'blowoff' score interpretation, suggesting no imminent market stress or reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp increase in bond yields would contradict the historical bottom pattern and suggest economic strength rather than a market bottom

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
